summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The VistaShares Target 15 ACKtivist Distribution ETF (ACKY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed equities based on the BITA VistaShares ACKtivist Select Index. Additionally, it aims to achieve an annual income target of 15%, distributed monthly, by employing various options strategies ACKY was launched on Sep 9, 2025 and is issued by VistaShares.

holdings.infoBox: ACKY is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 15.41%, Brookfield at 15.35%, Uber Technologies at 14.26%, Microsoft at 12.82%, and Meta Platforms at 11.58%.
